title: Specify source adapter manifest
description: Refines `adapter.schema.json` for source adapters per workflow §Source adapter contract. Locks `axis` to the literal `source` and requires both `briefs.enumerate` and `briefs.extract` — together these close the operation set to `{enumerate, extract}` (the canonical iterator is `briefs.keys()`). The `kebabName` and `toolDeclaration` `$defs` are intentionally inlined (rather than `$ref`-resolved against `adapter.schema.json`) so the schema compiles without a registry lookup; the embedded `name` pattern MUST stay byte-identical to `adapter.schema.json#/$defs/kebabName.pattern`.

cache.description: workflow §D8 — optional cache opt-out switch (mirrors `adapter.schema.json#/properties/cache`). Absence ≡ cache on; `opt-out` makes every `extract`/`enumerate` run a cache miss with `reason: adapter-opt-out`.
